Bash(cat << 'EOSQL'
-- Migration: add_scheduled_jobs
-- Add cmd_schedule_enabled to room
ALTER TABLE `room` ADD COLUMN `cmd_schedule_enabled` BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT false;

-- Create scheduled_job table
CREATE TABLE `scheduled_job` \(
    `id` VARCHAR\(191\) NOT NULL,
    `agent_id` VARCHAR\(191\) NOT NULL,
    `room_id` VARCHAR\(191\) NOT NULL,
    `creator_id` VARCHAR\(191\) NOT NULL,
    `message` TEXT NOT NULL,
    `run_at` DATETIME\(3\) NOT NULL,
    `recurrence` VARCHAR\(191\) NULL,
    `recur_time` VARCHAR\(191\) NULL,
    `recur_weekday` INTEGER NULL,
    `status` VARCHAR\(191\) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active',
    `last_fired_at` DATETIME\(3\) NULL,
    `created_at` DATETIME\(3\) NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP\(3\),

    INDEX `scheduled_job_agent_id_status_idx`\(`agent_id`, `status`\),
    INDEX `scheduled_job_room_id_status_idx`\(`room_id`, `status`\),
    INDEX `scheduled_job_status_run_at_idx`\(`status`, `run_at`\),
    PRIMARY KEY \(`id`\)
\) DEFAULT CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

-- Add foreign keys
ALTER TABLE `scheduled_job` ADD CONSTRAINT `scheduled_job_agent_id_fkey` FOREIGN KEY \(`agent_id`\) REFERENCES `llm_agent`\(`id`\) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE;
ALTER TABLE `scheduled_job` ADD CONSTRAINT `scheduled_job_room_id_fkey` FOREIGN KEY \(`room_id`\) REFERENCES `room`\(`id`\) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE;
ALTER TABLE `scheduled_job` ADD CONSTRAINT `scheduled_job_creator_id_fkey` FOREIGN KEY \(`creator_id`\) REFERENCES `user`\(`id`\) ON DELETE RESTRICT ON UPDATE CASCADE;

-- Record migration
INSERT INTO _prisma_migrations \(id, checksum, migration_name, finished_at, applied_steps_count\)
VALUES \(UUID\(\), 'manual-scheduled-jobs', '20260310_add_scheduled_jobs', NOW\(\), 1\);
EOSQL)
